description: You are the on-duty Incident Commander at the Los Santos Emergency Communications Center. A major industrial incident is unfolding at a chemical storage facility on El Rancho Boulevard near Jamestown Street involving an explosion and structural fire with hazardous materials. Access the system at http://localhost (credentials: admin@opencad.local / Admin123!). Create a 10-70 structure fire call at El Rancho Boulevard and Jamestown Street with a narrative covering the HAZMAT concerns and incident severity. Issue a 'Safety Violation' citation to the facility's operations manager, Michael De Santa, for $2,500.00. File a person BOLO for a fleeing suspect described as a heavyset, bald white male wearing a blue work jacket.
